title: Rose App
searchPlaceholder: What awesome gift are you looking for?
about-title: melivering the Finest Gift Boxes for Your Special Moments
about-paragraph: Make every moment memorable with our premium gift boxes. Carefully curated and beautifully packaged, each box is filled with handpicked items designed to impress. Whether it's for a birthday, wedding, or a simple “thank you,” our gift boxes are crafted to leave a lasting impression — because thoughtful gifting starts here.
testimonial-content: I've been ordering from this flower shop for years and they never disappoint. The quality and service are exceptional!!
bestselling-paragraph: Not sure what to choose? Start with our best sellers, these are the gifts our customers keep coming back for. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, anniversary or wedding, our top picks are guaranteed to leave a lasting impression.
occasion-wedding-title: Celebrate Her Forever with a Gift She’ll Always Remember
occasion-engagement-title: Honor the Beginning of a Beautiful Journey Together
occasion-anniversary-title: Mark Every Year of Love with a Meaningful Surprise
valentine-carousel-description-1: Elegant gifts for every special moment.
valentine-carousel-description-2: Beautiful roses and chocolates for your love.
gift-card-title: Special Gifts For The People You Love

otp-error-description: The code you entered is invalid or expired.

notification-orderShipped-message: Your order #{orderId} has been shipped and will arrive in 2-3 business days.
aboutHeroDescription: Crafting Quality, Elegance, and Joy into every curated gift since 2018. Discover the artistry behind our blooms.
aboutValueQualityDescription: Sourced from the finest artisanal gardens globally to ensure lasting beauty.
aboutValueEleganceDescription: Timeless aesthetics designed for modern spaces and sophisticated tastes.
aboutValueJoyDescription: Creating moments of genuine connection and surprise in every delivery.
aboutEvent2018Description: Founder Elara Rose's vision takes root in a small boutique atelier. We started with only three signature arrangements.
aboutEvent2020Description: Establishing our signature style in the heart of the city. We merged traditional floristry with architectural design principles.
aboutEvent2022Description: Expanding to 50+ countries. Our logistical network was built to ensure freshness from farm to vase in under 24 hours.
aboutEventCurrentDescription: Launching our v2 digital experience. Bringing AI-assisted personalization to the gift-giving process.

name: Name
phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Egyptian phone number
subject: Subject
contactSuccess: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you soon.
contactDescription: Have a question about our bouquets or custom gift boxes? Our team is here to help make your moments special.
informationDescription: Feel free to visit us or reach out via phone. Our customer service team is available Monday to Friday, 9am - 6pm EST.
termsSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website.
introContent: By accessing our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue using our services.
productsContent: We sell gifts and fresh flowers. Due to seasonal availability, arrangements may vary slightly while maintaining overall design and quality.
ordersContent: All orders must be paid in full before processing. We reserve the right to cancel orders due to pricing errors or product unavailability.
deliveryContent: Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to traffic or unforeseen circumstances. Customers are responsible for accurate delivery details.
returnsContent: Because flowers are perishable, refunds are available only for damaged or incorrect items reported within 24 hours with photo evidence.
ipContent: All website content including images, text, and branding is protected and may not be reused without written permission.
liabilityContent: We are not responsible for indirect or consequential damages resulting from the use of our website or products.
privacySubtitle: Learn how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
introContentPrivacy: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website.
infoCollectContent: We may collect personal information such as your name, phone number, email address, and delivery details when you place an order or contact us.
dataProtectContent: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
cookiesContent: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze website traffic. You can disable cookies through your browser settings.
dataRetentionContent: We retain your information only as long as necessary to fulfill your orders and comply with legal obligations.
contactContent: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@yourstore.com.
faqsSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our gifts and services.
faq1Question: What types of gifts do you offer?
faq1Answer: We offer a wide range of gifts including flowers, chocolates, personalized items, and gift hampers.
faq2Answer: Yes, we offer same-day delivery in selected locations if orders are placed before the cut-off time.
faq3Answer: Absolutely! You can add personalized messages, select flower arrangements, and choose gift combinations.
faq4Answer: Refunds are available for damaged or incorrect items reported within 24 hours of delivery with photo evidence.
faq5Question: How can I contact customer support?
faq5Answer: You can reach us via email at support@yourstore.com or call us at +20-XXXXXXXXXX.
